text:
This problem needs to be worked on. Installation of www/lektor breaks jupiter notebook:

     File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/nbconvert/exporters/html.py", line 26, in <module>
        from nbconvert.filters.markdown_mistune import IPythonRenderer, MarkdownWithMath
      File "/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/nbconvert/filters/markdown_mistune.py", line 24, in <module>
        from mistune import BlockParser, HTMLRenderer, InlineParser, Markdown
    ImportError: cannot import name 'BlockParser' from 'mistune' (/usr/local/lib/python3.9/site-packages/mistune.py)
